rulings.Case Title: RICHARD HARTUNG VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 14, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Nancy T. Williams, Brayton Purcell LLP's motion to be relieved as counsel for Ann Hartung is granted. Counsel demonstrated she provided Ms. Hartung with proper notice of the motion and no opposition was filed. Hearing required unless counsel informs plaintiff of this tentative ruling and she states that she does not wish to contest. The hearing will be at 9:30a.m. Brayton Purcell must bring a proposed order to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/CML)
